must_detect.matched_text: To: Board Risk Committee; From: Ms. Jintana Viroj (Data Protection Officer) and Mr. Suthon Peerapat (Head of Legal); Date: 29 May 2026; Subject: Cross‑border payroll onboarding, DSAR/erasure status, and disclosure controls during financing
